**BREAKING CHANGE:** You need the last Obsidian version to use the function that modify the frontmatter, aka:
- Inline tags to frontmatter
- Auto-title for index

This update also allow to edit the frontmatter with regex without creating duplicate.

* fix: duplicate frontmatter (with new Obsidian API) by @Lisandra-dev in https://github.com/ObsidianPublisher/obsidian-github-publisher/pull/317
* feat: allow setting token for different repository by @Lisandra-dev in https://github.com/ObsidianPublisher/obsidian-github-publisher/pull/319


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ObsidianPublisher/obsidian-github-publisher/compare/6.15.7...7.0.0

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. 

## [6.15.1](https://github.com/obsidianMkdocs/obsidian-github-publisher/compare/6.14.3...6.15.1) (2024-02-18)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **Refactor**
	- Enhanced maintainability of code by replacing direct regex matching with a function call in file path and name conversions.
	- Improved code reusability in text replacement by utilizing a constant for regex patterns.

- **New Features**
	- Added settings for link transformation in the plugin, including options for URI conversion, slugification, and regex application.

- **Style**
	- Updated the width of `.github-publisher` buttons to be 100%.

- **Chores**
	- Updated utility functions to support new link transformation settings.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ObsidianPublisher/obsidian-github-publisher/compare/6.14.2...6.15.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Features
- Add dryRun settings by @Lisandra-dev
- Allow to "link" frontmatter to another, preventing to recopy long frontmatter by @Lisandra-dev

### Bug Fixes
- Ensure consistent behavior across various commands for frontmatter by @Lisandra-dev
- Prevent empty and wrong yaml by @Lisandra-dev
- Fix YAML and empty slug in Chinese by @Lisandra-dev
- Allow multiple options for slugify by @Lisandra-dev

### Refactor
- Optimize frontmatter to allow nested key with dot by @Lisandra-dev

### Chores
- Allow translation with Crowdin by @Lisandra-dev
- Crowdin update by @Lisandra-dev
- New Crowdin updates by @Lisandra-dev

Collaborator: @Lisandra-dev

## 5.0.0-7 (2023-02-19)


### ⚠ BREAKING CHANGES

* for maintining purpose, all settings are replaced/moved. Maybe broke if I forgot some things
* Remove the workflow update

releases.description:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See [commit-and-tag-version](https://github.com/absolute-version/commit-and-tag-version) for commit guidelines.
